overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy video game showing a cloaked character exploring a foggy grassland. The character circles a large bonfire with a roasting carcass before departing into the misty wilderness toward distant mountains.

agents.ego_description: slowly circling the bonfire while observing the roasting carcass and surroundings

entered.detail: tall crackling fire built from stacked wooden logs
wooden spit suspended over flames holding a small animal carcass
large leafless tree with twisted bare branches silhouetted against the fog
fog-shrouded mountain peaks visible in the background
waist-high brown grass covering the entire ground surface
dark boulders arranged around the bonfire perimeter

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a foggy grassland clearing centered around a large crackling bonfire with a roasting carcass. The camera circles the fire, revealing a dead gnarled tree behind it and misty mountains in the distance, with tall dry grass swaying in the wind.

events.description: character turns away from bonfire and begins walking into the open wilderness

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the tall grass away from the bonfire toward the distant mountains

entered.detail: dark marshy water visible through the grass on the left side
cluster of large dark boulders emerging from the grass

segments.scene_description: The character departs from the bonfire and walks into the expansive foggy grassland. The fire disappears behind as the character moves through the swaying tall grass toward the mist-shrouded mountains, passing scattered rocks and marshy wetlands.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins at a flickering campsite and transitions into a lonely trek across a vast, misty wilderness. It begins by circling a large crackling bonfire and a roasting carcass in a foggy clearing, revealing a gnarled dead tree and distant mountains through the swaying dry grass. As the character departs from the warmth of the fire, the camera follows them away from the light and deeper into the expansive grassland. The scene then shifts as the bonfire disappears behind the character, who moves through marshy wetlands and past scattered rocks. Finally, the perspective pushes forward into the dense mist, heading toward the shrouded peaks of the distant mountains.
